article_meta.title: PoliticsMeet the New Proud BoysThe far-right group's views and tactics are now emulated by federal agents.By Ali BrelandIllustration by The Atlantic

reasoning: The model avoided attributing quotes to the author and flagged several genuine author-prose bias instances. However, it missed multiple strong, explicit bias statements elsewhere in the author’s prose and misapplied at least one bias type label, with another debatable.
